title: quercus seemannii subsp. gulielmi-treleasei
intro: Quercus seemannii subsp. gulielmi-treleasei, also known as Trelease's oak, is a subspecies of evergreen tree belonging to the Quercus genus and native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus seemannii subsp. gulielmi-treleasei include potential antioxidant, anti-cancer, and anti-diabetic effects, as well as support for cardiovascular health and immune system function. Quercus seemannii subsp. gulielmi-treleasei is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosing.
